title: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D drops to $279 two days after launch
summary: The processor with 3D V-Cache technology sees its price drastically reduced, consolidating itself as the best mid-range gaming option.

title: Mount 11 fans and a 360 mm radiator on an RTX 3080 to reduce its temperature by 30°C
summary: The extreme cooling experiment achieves a significant temperature drop but barely improves FPS, generating turbine-like noise.

title: A mod allows playing GTA III and Vice City inside Grand Theft Auto San Andreas
summary: Players can explore Liberty City and Vice City without leaving the San Andreas map, reviving the classic installments.

title: Kimi launches its K3 AI model and sparks debate about its impact on the industry
summary: The Chinese company presents the Kimi K3, which some consider a threat to dominant Western models.

title: Waymo resumes its autonomous taxi service in San Francisco after a one-hour pause
summary: Alphabet's subsidiary restores the operation of its driverless vehicles after a brief interruption.

title: China creates the World Organization for Cooperation in Artificial Intelligence to promote a parallel order
summary: The initiative led by Xi Jinping seeks to establish alternative standards to Western ones in AI development.

title: Open-weight models achieve the performance of frontier models from four months ago at a fraction of the cost
summary: The advancement of open models reduces the gap with proprietary systems, democratizing artificial intelligence.

title: The Pentagon adopts a new AI manual that considers slow adoption as a greater risk than imperfect alignment
summary: The US Department of Defense prioritizes speed of deployment over perfection in the use of artificial intelligence.

title: Anthropic drastically reduces Claude Fable 5 limits in Max and Team Premium plans
summary: The AI company adjusts its flagship model, pushing Pro users towards API usage-based pricing.

title: Prompt injection attacks frustrate AI-based hacking agents
summary: Prompt injection vulnerabilities are limiting the effectiveness of automated cybersecurity systems.

title: How Google's new Gemini fees work and how to track your usage
summary: Google updates its billing model for the AI assistant, offering more transparency in consumption.

title: Your period tracker is probably spying on you
summary: Menstrual tracking apps collect sensitive data that could be shared without consent.

title: LG monitors install software without consent through Windows Update
summary: Users report that their LG screens receive unsolicited drivers and applications through the update system.

title: Apple begins talks with the US Department of Justice to resolve the iPhone antitrust case
summary: The company seeks an out-of-court settlement in the lawsuit accusing it of monopolistic practices in app distribution.

title: Valve warns that the memory crisis is worsening and retail prices are six months behind bulk supply
summary: The company warns about the increase in costs of memory modules, affecting hardware availability.

title: AMD Ryzen 500 'Medusa Point' with 10 Zen6 cores leaks with 28% higher performance than Zen5 HX 370
summary: AMD's next processor shows significant improvement in performance tests, pointing to an ambitious launch.

title: The Surface Laptop Ultra with NVIDIA N1X matches the Apple M3 Max in Cinebench 2026
summary: Microsoft's new laptop with NVIDIA chip achieves the performance of Apple's top-end processor.

title: GPT-5.6 solves a convex optimization problem that had been open for 30 years using a single prompt
summary: OpenAI's model demonstrates advanced mathematical reasoning ability by solving a historic challenge.

title: Denmark builds an artificial island to supply renewable energy to half of Europe
summary: The giant wind project will provide electricity to several countries, transforming the continent's energy system.

title: Autonomous microdrone manages to kill insects in flight for the first time, on track to eradicate mosquitoes
summary: The 40-gram drone uses car parking sensors to eliminate mosquitoes remotely and precisely.
